title: The 100% Return Investment 1 in 3 Workers Refuses
hook: Your employer is offering a 100% guaranteed return on your money right now — and millions of people are literally saying no.
angle: Reframes 401k employer match as the only guaranteed 100% return available to anyone, and quantifies exactly how much people forfeit over a lifetime.
audience: Working adults aged 22-45 who aren't maxing their 401k employer match, especially those early in their careers
key_numbers: $2,820/yr free on a $60K salary at 4.7% match
1 in 3 eligible workers forfeit the full match
